title: How to change color of Submit form Button on lead generation form?
excerpt: I’m designing a lead generation form for our website and I’d like to inquire whether it’s possible to customize the color of the submit button. Our website has a predominant brown theme, and I believe it’s crucial for th…

posts.author: zahranooreen (zahra)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m designing a lead generation form for our website and I’d like to inquire whether it’s possible to customize the color of the submit button. Our website has a predominant brown theme, and I believe it’s crucial for the button to align with our unique design. Considering that each company has its own distinct website design, having the flexibility to change the button color is important.

Someone please let me know from where i can change the pink color in submit button to brown?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @zahranooreen ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately I do not believe it is currently possible to change the color of the submit button

Would be glad to hear if anyone thinks otherwise.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Marenatteo (Matteo Arena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have the same problem. I think it’s paradoxical that Monday allows you to customize the background and graphics of the form without then allowing you to change the color of the progress and submit buttons on the form. Furthermore, allowing the color of the buttons to be changed would be a very trivial thing to implement.
